name: Lithium
description_short: Lithium Federal Credit Union is a member-owned cooperative in Bessemer City, NC offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards to eligible employees and their families.
description_long:
Lithium Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned cooperative financial institution based in Bessemer City, North Carolina. Founded to serve specific employee groups and their families, the credit union operates with a mission of "People Helping People" and maintains a single physical location at 119 W. Pennsylvania Ave. in Bessemer City. The organization is regulated as a federal credit union and maintains standard banking hours Monday-Friday from 9 am to 5 pm.

Lithium FCU offers a comprehensive range of deposit and loan products. Deposit accounts include checking accounts, savings accounts, Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs), Christmas Club accounts, and Certificates of Deposit. On the lending side, they provide new and used auto loans, home equity loans, personal loans, VISA credit cards, loans for recreational vehicles (campers, RVs, motorcycles, horse trailers), payday-alternative loans, and overdraft protection loans. Members also have access to ancillary services including bill pay, debit cards, wire transfers, free notary service, and discounted tickets to local attractions. The credit union partners with Trustage for auto and home insurance offerings.

Lithium FCU's primary distinguishing feature is its restricted membership model. Eligibility is limited to employees or retirees from 15+ specific Select Employee Groups (SEGs) including Rio Tinto's Bessemer City facility, City of Bessemer City employees, Parker-Hannifin Corp., Advanced Drainage Systems, and the United States Postal Service office in Bessemer City. Immediate family members of current members and individuals sharing an economic household unit with members are also eligible. This membership restriction creates a tight-knit community of members with shared employment or family connections.

Lithium FCU serves a genuine niche in local banking for eligible members, offering competitive products and personalized service. However, the severely restricted membership requirements mean this institution is only accessible to a narrow population. The single physical location and limited operating hours (closed weekends) may present inconvenience for some members. While they offer payday-alternative loans and maintain reasonable service fees, there is no publicly available information about specific interest rates, APRs, or competitive benchmarking against other financial institutions.
pros: Member-owned not-for-profit structure means profits are returned to members rather than shareholders
Offers payday-alternative loans as a responsible small-dollar lending option
Comprehensive loan product offerings including specialty loans for RVs, campers, motorcycles, and horse trailers
Provides credit life, credit disability, and GAP protection on loans
Low minimum deposit requirement of $20 to open a share account
24-hour audio response system for account information access
cons: Severely restricted membership eligibility limited to specific employee groups and their families—not open to the general public
Single physical location in Bessemer City, NC only—no branch network or geographic flexibility
Limited operating hours (closed weekends and after 5 pm weekdays) reduce accessibility
No publicly available information on interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules to compare competitiveness
Small institution size may limit resources, technology development, and competitive product innovation
best_for: Employees of Rio Tinto's Bessemer City facility and their families seeking member-owned banking
City of Bessemer City employees and retirees needing comprehensive lending and deposit services
Employees of Parker-Hannifin, Advanced Drainage Systems, USPS, and other eligible SEGs in the region
Families seeking to consolidate banking with a trusted local institution through immediate family membership eligibility
diagnosis: Lithium FCU is best for employees of Rio Tinto, City of Bessemer City, Parker-Hannifin, Advanced Drainage Systems, USPS Bessemer City, and their immediate family members seeking member-owned banking with competitive loan products. The primary caveat is that membership is completely restricted—the general public cannot join, making this institution inaccessible to most consumers regardless of creditworthiness or interest.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Lithium — Credit Union in BESSEMER CITY, NC | CreditDoc
meta_description: Lithium — NCUA-insured credit union in BESSEMER CITY, NC. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
